ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "code" TEXT /* Stock exchange code for the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which financial data is reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time the exchange opens */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time the exchange closes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_exchange" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-exchange relationship */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the company was listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_exchange_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_exchange_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "price" REAL /* Current stock price */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in stock price */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening stock price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest stock price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest stock price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the stock price record */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "previous_close" REAL /* Previous day's closing price */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial statement */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue for the period */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income for the period */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "equity" REAL /* Equity of the company */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow for the period */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends paid during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_industry" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-industry relationship */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_industry_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industry ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_industry_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_sector" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-sector relationship */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_sector_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sector ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_sector_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
